  • Who am I?
  • CV

    Zosia Marciniak

    My name is Zofia (formally), or Zosia (pronounced Zoh-see-ah). I am an Engineer at Samsung Electronics. Previously, I researched Human-Computer Interaction at KAIST, Make Lab. My interest is specifically in digital fabrication. I explore digitalization opportunities for crafters.

      Let's catch up!

    • Google Scholar
    • Github
    • LinkedIn

    Publications

    You can also find my articles on my Google Scholar profile.

    StitchFlow: Enabling In-Situ Creative Explorations of Crochet Patterns with Stitch Tracking and Process Sharing

    Decoupling Geometry from Surface Finish by Parameterizing Texture Directly in G-code for Fused Deposition Modeling (FDM) Printing

    Published in AODR, 2024 [Read the Paper]

    Zofia Marciniak, Kongpyung Moon, and Andrea Bianchi

    3D Printing Locally Activated Visual-Displays Embedded in 3D Objects via Electrically Conductive and Thermochromic Materials

    Kongpyung (Justin) Moon, Zofia Marciniak, Ryo Suzuki, and Andrea Bianchi
